# FootyMetrics

> Football match analysis platform: manual event tagging by experienced analysts delivered as coach-ready dashboards, player profiles and squad analytics for clubs and academies.

FootyMetrics turns match video into structured insight. Each match is tagged event-by-event (passes, shots with xG, defensive actions, set pieces, attacking phases) and presented through dashboards built for two audiences: coaches who need tactical breakdowns, and players who want to track their own development.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Organization selector and entry point for client clubs.
- [Demo](/demo): Interactive demo with simulated data showing the Coach View (squad analysis, attacking phases, set pieces) and Player View (player profile with shot maps, pass maps, performance trends).
- [Pricing](/pricing): Two packages — Team Essentials ($25/match) for core stats and reports, and Pro Analytics ($100/match) for full event tagging, xG, attacking phases, season dashboards and player comparison. Both include a 1-month free trial (3 matches).

## Optional

- Per-club workspaces live under `/org/:orgSlug` and are private to authenticated members of each organization.
